narrative_constraints.statement: Road surface (rijbaan) to use gebakken klinker keiformaat, keperverband, kleur bruno.

provenance.quoted_text: Rijbaan; gebakken klinker keiformaat, keperverband, kleur bruno

reasons: Stated as image caption in beeldkwaliteitplan; prescriptive intent but not a binding regels clause.

narrative_constraints.statement: Pavement (trottoir) to use gebakken klinker dikformaat, elleboogverband.

reasons: Stated as image caption in beeldkwaliteitplan; prescriptive intent but not a binding regels clause.

narrative_constraints.statement: Cycle path (fietspad) to use rood asfalt; fietsstraat with rijbaan of rood asfalt and rabatstrook in gebakken klinkers.

provenance.quoted_text: Fietspad; rood asfalt Fietsstraat; rijbaan van rood asfalt, rabatstrook in gebakken klinkers

reasons: Stated as image caption in beeldkwaliteitplan; prescriptive intent but not binding regels.

narrative_constraints.statement: Park paths (parkpaden) to use halfverharding or asfaltpaden met afgestrooide toplaag.

provenance.quoted_text: Parkpaden; halfverharding of asfaltpaden met afgestrooide toplaag

reasons: Stated as image caption in beeldkwaliteitplan; prescriptive intent but not binding regels.

narrative_constraints.statement: Waterside banks (overs) to be naturally designed with bloemrijkgrasland (flower-rich grassland).

reasons: Image caption in beeldkwaliteitplan; qualitative design intent.

narrative_constraints.statement: Street lighting to have a robuuste en ingetogen (robust and understated) design in colour RAL 7012.

reasons: Colour specification (RAL 7012) gives a concrete standard; not a binding regels clause but specific enough to guide design.

narrative_constraints.statement: Street furniture (meubilair) to be designed as a family with robuuste en ingetogen (robust and understated) design in colour RAL 7012.

provenance.quoted_text: Familie van meubilair; Robuuste en ingetogen vormgeving (RAL 7012)

reasons: Colour specification (RAL 7012) gives a concrete standard; beeldkwaliteitplan prescriptive intent.

narrative_constraints.statement: Bridges for motorised traffic to be designed as a family of bridges (familie van bruggen); bridges for slow traffic to be recognisable (herkenbare bruggen).

provenance.quoted_text: Bruggen langzaam verkeer Herkenbare bruggen Bruggen gemotoriseerd verkeer, ontworpen als familie van bruggen

reasons: Qualitative design guideline from beeldkwaliteitplan; not a binding regels clause.

urban_intent_passages: Beeldkwaliteit algemeen: Materialen, Beplanting, Inrichtingselementen — This page establishes general image-quality guidelines for public space materials (paving types per road category), planting (naturalistic waterside banks with bloemrijkgrasland, plantvakken combined with seating, geveltuin), and street furniture/lighting elements (robust, understated design in RAL 7012, coherent bridge families).
